name: Arrangement Canvas
description: Multi-track audio arrangement canvas with stem rows, waveform regions, automation lanes, beat grid, markers, collaborator cursors, and a moving playhead.

session.description: Full arrangement editor for active production sessions with timeline ruler, stem rows, regions, automation lanes, and collaborator cursors

preview.description: Read-only public preview of the arrangement canvas, suitable for marketing and showcase first viewports

visual_brief: A serious commercial DAW arrangement view. A sticky time ruler spans the top with bar numbers, beat subdivisions, and section markers. Each track row has a compact fixed left header with stem color, name, mute/solo/arm controls, gain readout, and selected state. Timeline regions are clipped waveform blocks aligned to the beat grid, with subtle depth and no decorative glow overload. Automation lanes use fine amber/cyan curves with node points under selected rows. Marker flags identify Intro, Verse, Hook, Drop, and Bridge. The playhead is precise and spans every track. Collaborator cursors appear as named flags with thin vertical guides. The canvas must feel like the main product, not a placeholder chart.

slots.time-ruler: Top ruler with bar numbers, beat ticks, loop range, and marker flags.
slots.track-stack: Stack of stem rows. Each row preserves a fixed header plus horizontally scrollable timeline region.
slots.waveform-region: Colored clip blocks with waveform bars, trim handles, fade handles, and clip names.
slots.automation-lane: Attached lane showing parameter curve and draggable node points.
slots.collaboration-layer: Playhead and named collaborator cursors share the same time coordinate system.

micro.region-select: selected region gains border glow and subtle lift in 120ms

ambient.collaborator-cursors: remote cursors ease to new positions within 160ms

mobile.notes: Use horizontal timeline scroll with stable track row heights and fixed headers where possible. Keep transport and selected stem inspector available. Do not compress waveform regions until labels become unreadable.

responsive.desktop: Render full time ruler, fixed stem headers, visible automation lanes, markers, and collaborator cursors.

keyboard: M/S/R: mute, solo, or arm focused stem

layout_hints.temporal_alignment: Every visual layer must align to one shared time grid.
layout_hints.mobile_survival: Do not collapse the DAW into unreadable columns; allow intentional horizontal scroll and panel switching.
layout_hints.producer_signal: The canvas should immediately read as an audio production tool, not a generic kanban or table.
